name: FMD immunosenescence elderly trial is stale unknown-status with no posted results
summary: NCT04928963 is relevant FMD, vaccine-response, and frailty registry context, but its stale unknown status and no-results state prevent evidence-stage movement.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT04928963 as an unknown-status 40-participant fasting-mimicking diet trial in elderly frailty, inflammation, and immune-system-disorder context, with safety, feasibility, flu-vaccine immune-response, and frailty-prevention endpoints and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Elderly participants in frailty, inflammation, and immune-system-disorder context
time_horizon: Six-month endpoint window with estimated study completion in December 2022
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment is 40; registry status is unknown; result status is not posted; the registry has not had a posted update since 2021-10-25.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of benefit or failure.
FMD effects are difficult to attribute specifically to macroautophagy rather than broad nutrient-sensing, metabolic, and immune mechanisms.
The stale registry status makes completion and publication status uncertain.
